# excludesCurrentProcessAudio

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether to exclude audio from your app during capture.

## Declaration

```swift
var excludesCurrentProcessAudio: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false]. If you include your app process in the stream output, you can set this value to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] to exclude its audio.

## Configuring audio

- **capturesAudio**: A Boolean value that indicates whether to capture audio.
- **sampleRate**: The sample rate for audio capture.
- **channelCount**: The number of audio channels to capture.
